comment: OP-wide gap (not DCR): discovery does not advertise userinfo_signing_alg_values_supported (signed UserInfo responses are not supported).
OP-wide gap (not DCR): signed (JWT) UserInfo responses are not supported.
OP-wide gap (not DCR): signed (JWT) UserInfo responses are not supported.
OP-wide gap (not DCR): signed (JWT) UserInfo responses are not supported.

Environment-only (local/CI docker): the OP cannot validate the client_assertion because it fails to fetch the client's jwks_uri from the conformance suite, which serves it over a self-signed TLS cert (cURL error 60). jwks_uri IS supported and passes against a publicly-trusted cert (hosted conformance).
OP-wide gap (not DCR): the OP does not rotate its signing keys on demand. Not a DCR test (server_metadata variant only).

DCR scope-default limitation: a client registered without an explicit 'scope' is granted only 'openid', so a later authorization request for offline_access is rejected. Matches both oidcc-refresh-token and oidcc-refresh-token-rp-key-rotation. See docs/5-oidc-conformance.md.
